MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF NICK MINIELLO'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANT P.G.& E.'S EMPLOYEES DES BELL AND JOHN SIMON. Appearances: Moira McQuaid of the Law Offices of Moira McQuaid (650.359.2545) for plaintiff and moving party; Duyen Nguyen of Lafayette & Kumagai (357.4600) for defendant and responding party. Alvarado; Not reported

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.

APPEARANCES: Phil Horowitz, Esq. of Law Offices of Phil Horowitz 391-0111 & Moira McQuaid, Esq. of Law Offices of Moira C. McQuaid 650/359-2545 for pltf & opposing party; Darren P. Roach, Esq. 973-6345 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER DEFENDANT ACTED WITH DISCRIMINATORY ANIMUS WHEN TERMINATING PLAINTIFF. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT WAS AT-WILL, DEFENDANT CANNOT FIRE PLAINTIFF FOR DISCRIMINATORY REASONS. SEE STEVENSON V. SUPERIOR COURT (1997) 16 CAL.4TH 880, 887. Defendant's objections to evidence signed in open court. In addition, the Court ruled on other objections as follows: As to the Dujmovich declaration, Court sustained objections 26, 27, 28, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 40-45, 48-50, 52, 53; Garrett declaration stricken as not signed under penalty of perjury; Wilmes sustained as to 1-4; Miniello deposition sustained as to 7, 11, 14, and 24; overruled as to all other objections. As to defendant's objection to late filing and service of plaintiff's additional disputed and undisputed material facts, Court overruled objection. Defendant's request to submit evidence with reply granted by the Court and considered. Court overruled objection to plaintiff's inclusion of objections to evidence and legal and factual argument in response to separate statement of facts (not proper to object to separate statements). (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
